titleStmt.title: SII 28.145: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 145. (A.R. No. 300 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, Second prākāra, north wall.

This record's contents are in continuation of those in the previous number. It clarifies some details left unsaid in the other record and supplies a some details which have been lost in the damaged portion of that record.

The donor is the same Gaṅgai-koṇḍāḷ, the aḻagi of the uḍaiyāṉ of Kuṇamalaippāḍi (Kuṇamalaippuram in the previous record) in Veṇṇikkūṟṟam in Chuttamali-vaḷanāḍu. The latter was related to (virundam) Kundaṉ alias Ilaṅkēśvaraṉ of Araśūr in Āṟkāṭṭu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-kulāśaṉivaḷanāḍu (He appears to have been a very important person as otherwise the reference to him in the record has no relevance.) The lady endowed 6 mā of land which due to the viruvu process (explanation of this term is not available) was reckoned as 7(1/2) mā, 1/2 kāṇi and kiḻ 17(1/2) mā (mukkālē iru māv-arai) for raising a garden to be called “eṉṉai rakshittān” to measure out 1 kalam 1 tūṇi and 4 nāḻi of flowers per day (to the temple). There were to be 20 persons to tend the garden (tirunandavāṉa-kkuḍigaḷ) and a supervisor (nāyakam) over them. The former were to get 1 kuṟuṇi, 4 nāḻi of paddy per day per person and the nāyakam one padakku of paddy per day. For securing the supply of paddy for this purpose apparently the same lady purchased and endoud land in several plots (total extent 2 vēli, 18 mā 3(1/2) kāṇi and kiḻ 3/4 •• mā). On this land kaḍamai was to be paid and the balance of the yield was to be utilised for the said purpose.

The king ordered this record to be inscribed in the tirumāḷigai on the representation of Toṇḍaimāṉ. The king's order also pertained to the entry of the concerned document (sādhanaṅgaḷ) in the tirukkai-oṭṭi and to the inclusion of the said lands in the income (pala-varavai) (of the temple). Tirumandira-ōlai Rājendraśiṅga-mūvēndavēḷān, Toṇḍaimāṉ and others attested the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§[ svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉa] ccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭu nāḷ patiṉālu toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum madhurān=takabrahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyat tirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum
[sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyi]l nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷuñ ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkup pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu Aracūruṭaiyāṉ kuntaṉāṉa Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ viruntam cuttamali vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇikkūṟṟattu
kuṇamalaippāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyāṉa kaṅkai koṇṭāḷ taṉkāṇiyāṉa nilattut tirunāmattukkāṇiyākat tanta pramāṇappaṭi perumpaṟṟappuliyūr mulaparuṣaiyāril kāṭaṉ śrīpatañjali tevaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal Uḻaiccāṇaṉ civatavaṉa vāsi
poṉṉamplakkūttaṉ perāl melpiṭākai caṇḍeśvara nallūril vilaikoṇṭa kuntavaivatikku meṟku śrīcoḻakulacuntari vāykkālukkut teṟku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu pelioṭu peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum Ivvaḻikkut teṟkum pā
ṟvatiśvaramuṭaiyār tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellai Iṉum Uḷppaṭṭa Ūrppaṭi nilam Āṟumāviṉāl virivu nilam Eḻumā Araikkāṇikkiḻ mukkāle Irumāvarai
yum Eṉṉai rakṣittāṉ Eṉṉum perāl tirunantavaṉañ ceytu nāḷoṉṟukkukkalaṉe tūṇi nāṉāḻi tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum Itukkut tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ per pattum nāyakam per Oṉṟum mutal koḷḷavum per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi
nāṉāḻiyum nāyakam per Oruvaṉukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku patakkāka vanta nellum peṟavum peṟumiṭattu Uḻaiccāṇaṉ poṉṉampalakkūttaṉ pakkal vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ peril Aṉṉiya nāmakaraṇattu vilai koṇṭa Ivvūr
vaṭapiṭākai paḷḷipaṭaiyāṉa vikkirama coḻanallūṟpāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku rājarājaṉ vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu Uyyakkoṇṭa viḷākameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukku Ellai Aṟutikkuk kiḻakkum vācciyaṉ
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nilattiṉukkut teṟkum maṭappuṟattiṉukku meṟkum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ Aṅki poṉṉampalakkūttaṉ nilattiṉukku vaṭakku (vaṭakkum) Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum viḷai nilamum kuḷamum nattamum Uḷpaṭak karuttaḷavāka mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vanta nilam
kāliṉāl virivu nilam Āṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ Eṇmāvaraiyum virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷaṉāṭṭu viḷattūrnāṭṭup piraḷayaviṭaṅka nallūṟpāl kuntaṉāyaka mayakkal Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai kiḻmuttuṭaiyāṉ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai periya kuḷattukku vaṭak
kum melpāṟkellai pakaṭamaṅkalattellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kumāramaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ nilattukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellai Iṉum naṭuvuḷppaṭṭa nilam Eṭṭumāvum Intap periya kuḷattu nila Opāti Iṟaikku Uṭaiyāṉ kuṭiyum Iṅke
cuntaracoḻa mayakkaleṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellai Uḷ ciṟuvāykkālukku meṟkum Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakkum muḻaiyūru k kiḻakkum Uḷciṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellai Uḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mukkāle Orumāvum
kaṅkai mayakkaleṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellai taiyilokkimāteviRead trailokya mahādevinallūrkkup pokiṟa peruvaḻikku meṟkum kuṭukki ṟaṉi lukkuk kiḻakkum muḻaiyūruṭaiyāṉ nilattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellai Uḷ naṭuvuppaṭṭa nilam Araiyum
Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam mummāvaraiyum Ivvūrkkollai nilattukku Ellai muḻaiyūruṭaiyāṉ villi maṉaikku meṟkum Etirili coḻamaṅkalattukku vaṭakkum pakaṭamaṅkalattu Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum Uṭaiyār tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya
yār Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili nilattukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa Arai ku nilam Oṉṟe Eṭṭumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mukkālum Iṉṉāṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭu Ulakuyyayakko
ṇṭacoḻacaruppetimaṅkalattu piṭākai lakaṇṭar kaṇṭavatikku meṟkum coḻamātevi vāykkālukkut teṟku Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mu ṟ catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya Ūrppaṭi nilam Āṟu mā Itil meṟkaṭaiya nilam Ūrppaṭi Iraṇṭu māvum Ivvūr
piṟinta Arumpūrāṉa rājendracoḻanallū vatikku meṟkum coḻamātevi vāykkālukkut teṟkum muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattut teṟkaṭaiya Ūrppaṭi nilam Āṟumā Itil meṟkaṭaiya Ūrppaṭi nilam mākāṇi
Āka Ūrppaṭi nilam muṉṟu mākkāṇiyiṉāl virivu kāle Orumā Araiye Araikkāṇik kiḻakkāl Āka nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle muṉṟumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ mukkāle māvukkum kaṭamai Iṟuttu Iṟai mikuti peṟavum Innilaṅkaḷukku
Ivaḷ tanta sādhanaṅkaḷ tirukkai Oṭṭiyile O ṉ nilam palavaravai Oṭuṅ kūṭṭavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉ tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatāka
ccoṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyya paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai rājendraciṅka muventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai vicaiyarāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum
Ivai paṅkaḷarāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai rācarāca ppallavaraiyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai cittirāyaṉeḻut teṉṟum prasātañ ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
